menu7.title: Corporate Governance
menu7.desc1: The 'Ko‘prikqurilish' trust was established in 1968 as the 7th Bridge Construction Trust under the former USSR Ministry of Transport Construction. During the independence years, it operated as part of the 'Uzbektransqurilish' association and was incorporated into the 'Uzbekistan Railways' DATYK by the resolution No. 489 of the Cabinet of Ministers of the Republic of Uzbekistan on October 21, 2004.
menu7.desc2: 'Ko‘prikqurilish' trust specializes in construction, maintenance, and repair of railway transport structures (bridges, tunnels, overpasses, and other artificial structures). It is the only enterprise in the republic that also has production facilities, a design organization, and a quality control laboratory for construction works.
menu7.desc3: Until 2017, the following units operated within the 'Ko‘prikqurilish Trust' unitary enterprise:

presidentDecision: According to the Resolution of the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan dated October 4, 2017, No. PQ-3309, additional specialized units were established under the “Ko‘prikqurilish Trust”.
currentCompanies: Today, the following enterprises operate within the structure of the “Ko‘prikqurilish Trust”:
currentUnits: Chinoz Special Reinforced Concrete Plant LLC
reorganizationNotice: According to the Resolution No. 389/18 of the Cabinet of Ministers of the Republic of Uzbekistan dated August 15, 2023, the “Ko‘prikqurilish” Joint-Stock Company has been reorganized.

item1.name: ZOOMLION QY35V532
item1.desc: ZOOMLION QY35V532 is a 35-ton truck crane equipped with a 5-section telescopic boom and a hydraulic proportional control system. The 6×4 drive and hydraulic power steering provide excellent driving performance and flexible control.

item2.name: SANY STC-500
item2.desc: SANY STC-500 is a 50-ton lifting truck crane. It features a 42.5 m main boom and a 16 m jib. Equipped with a load feedback and constant power control system. The colorful LCD display shows load weight, boom length, and angle information.

item3.name: ZOOMLION QY55V532.2
item3.desc: ZOOMLION QY55V532.2 is a powerful 55-ton truck crane. With a 43 m main boom and 16 m luffing jib, it is used for lifting heavy loads at great heights on complex construction sites. It has a maximum working radius of 32 m.

item4.name: ZOOMLION ZTC-1500
item4.desc: ZOOMLION ZTC-1500 is a 150-ton mega crane designed for high-rise buildings and large industrial construction projects. Its telescopic boom ensures accurate and safe operation even at high elevations.

item5.name: SANY STC-1600
item5.desc: SANY STC-1600 is a high-capacity 160-ton truck crane designed for heavy-duty industrial and infrastructure projects. Equipped with a powerful hydraulic and stability control system.

item6.name: SANY SAC-1800
item6.desc: SANY SAC-1800 is a 180-ton all-terrain crane adapted for operation on all road surfaces. Ideal for unique and complex projects with high lifting capacity and a flexible chassis system.

item7.name: DAEWOO Novus (45m)
item7.desc: DAEWOO Novus 45-meter aerial platform is designed for urban construction, electrical line installation, communication systems, and high-altitude maintenance work. Its spacious platform ensures safe operation.

item8.name: DONGFENG (30m)
item8.desc: DONGFENG 30-meter aerial platform is suitable for electrical network work and high-altitude technical inspections. It can easily maneuver through narrow city streets.

item9.name: JAC XCMG (25m)
item9.desc: JAC XCMG 25-meter lightweight aerial platform is ideal for municipal services, landscaping, and technical inspections. Known for its compact size and excellent maneuverability.

item10.name: HOWO SINOTRUK Special
item10.desc: HOWO SINOTRUK special aerial platform is adapted for efficient operation in tight and difficult conditions. It features a powerful diesel engine and reliable hydraulic system.

item11.name: SANY SCC350TB
item11.desc: SANY SCC350TB is a 35-ton telescopic crawler crane. It has a maximum boom length of 31.5 m and a 13.7 m auxiliary boom. Provides unmatched stability and mobility on uneven terrain.

item12.name: SANY SCC550TB
item12.desc: SANY SCC550TB is a 55-ton telescopic crawler crane designed for handling heavy loads on large construction sites.

item13.name: SANY SCC1350A-1
item13.desc: SANY SCC1350A-1 is a 135-ton lattice boom crawler crane used in industrial and large infrastructure projects.

item14.name: LIEBHERR LTR 1220
item14.desc: LIEBHERR LTR 1220 is a 220-ton telescopic crawler crane. Ideal for wind turbine installation and industrial facilities.

item15.name: LIEBHERR HS 855 HD
item15.desc: LIEBHERR HS 855 HD is a multifunctional crawler crane widely used for pile driving and excavation works.

item16.name: Bauer BG 36
item16.desc: Bauer BG 36 is a rotary drilling rig designed for operation in hard and complex soil conditions.

item17.name: LIEBHERR LB 36-410
item17.desc: LIEBHERR LB 36-410 is a drilling rig for heavy foundation works. It can operate at depths up to 88 m.

item18.name: Crawler Auger HDR-200
item18.desc: Crawler mechanical auger HDR-200 is designed for communication lines and electric pole installation works.

item19.name: Pile Driver SP-49
item19.desc: SP-49 is a classic pile driving machine used for driving piles deep into the ground.

item20.name: Bauer Woltman PVE 5021
item20.desc: Bauer Woltman PVE 5021 is a vibratory pile driving machine designed for port and bridge construction projects.

item21.name: LIEBHERR LRH 100
item21.desc: LIEBHERR LRH 100 is a hydraulic pile driving and drilling rig.

item22.name: RTG RM 20
item22.desc: RTG RM 20 is a pile driving machine with impact and rotary drilling systems.

item23.name: HAUSHERR HSB 3000
item23.desc: HAUSHERR HSB 3000 is a heavy-class drilling equipment system.

item24.name: VOLVO Tractor Unit
item24.desc: VOLVO heavy-duty tractor unit is designed for transporting oversized and heavy trailers.

item25.name: GOLDHOFER THP SL 8
item25.desc: GOLDHOFER THP SL 8 is an 8-axle hydraulic modular trailer designed for transporting extremely heavy loads.

items.text: The day-to-day activities of the company are directed by the executive body – Company Management.
The Company Management Chairman leads management activities.
Chairman of Management - Maxamatov Zafar Ergashboyevich.
The Company Management may include the Chairman, deputies, department heads, section heads, and employees.

businessPlan.title: “Ko‘prikqurilish” JSC – Business Plan for 2025
businessPlan.subtitle: Main directions of “Ko‘prikqurilish” JSC:
items: Construction, reconstruction, and capital repair of roads, bridges, tunnels using innovative technologies according to international standards
Submission of draft regulatory documents to sector organizations, ministries, and the Government of the Republic of Uzbekistan
Cooperation with foreign countries and international organizations
Participation in tenders (auctions), including cooperation with other enterprises (consortium, subcontract, etc.)
Determination of the value of services, products, and work provided by the company and its subsidiaries based on market conditions
businessPlan.objective: Develop a business implementation plan, improve company performance from a commercial perspective, and explore income opportunities from construction and installation work
businessPlan.additional: Also, maintain and increase market share in reinforced concrete production and services, improve labor productivity and efficiency in the company structure, and achieve planned annual revenue and profit targets

ustavKapital: The company's charter capital is 1,445,258,000 UZS (one billion four hundred forty-five million two hundred fifty-eight thousand UZS). All shares belong to the sole shareholder – the Agency for Management of State Assets of the Republic of Uzbekistan.

vacancy.job_desc1: 2 grader drivers, 2 dispatchers (female), 2 fuel station operators
vacancy.job_desc2: Implementation of internal control and compliance systems. Monitoring compliance with legislation and internal policies...
vacancy.ariza_desc: To apply for this vacancy, click the button or contact us.

job2.job_desc2: Higher education (law, economics, or finance). 1–3 years of experience in internal control or audit. Knowledge of Uzbekistan legislation. Skills in working with documents and reports. MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint. Analytical thinking and responsibility.
job2.job_desc4: Implementation of internal control and compliance systems. Monitoring compliance with legislation and internal policies. Anti-corruption policy monitoring. Risk identification and mitigation. Legal review of contracts and documents. Identifying and resolving conflicts of interest.
job2.job_desc8: Official employment contract. Stable workplace. Timely salary. Professional development opportunities. Modern office equipment.

requirements.req2: 1–3 years of experience in internal control or audit

responsibilities.resp1: Implementation of internal control and compliance systems
responsibilities.resp2: Monitoring compliance with legislation and internal policies
responsibilities.resp5: Legal review of contracts and documents
responsibilities.resp6: Identifying and resolving conflicts of interest

job4.job_desc2: Higher education. At least 10 years of work experience in audit, accounting, finance, or tax control. Having an internal auditor certificate is preferred. Knowledge of international accounting standards is supported.
job4.job_desc2_info2: At least 10 years of work experience in audit, accounting, finance, or tax control
job4.job_desc2_info3: Having an internal auditor certificate is preferred
job4.job_desc2_info4: Knowledge of international accounting standards is supported
job4.job_desc4: Carrying out internal audit activities. Analyzing financial and accounting documents. Preparing audit conclusions and recommendations.
job4.job_desc6: Working days: Monday–Friday. Working hours: 09:00–18:00. Days off: Saturday and Sunday.

job5.company: Department of Construction Mechanization, Energy and Labor Protection
job5.title: Lead Power Engineer
job5.experience: Minimum 5 years (in energy sector or related field)

responsibilities.resp1: Monitor electricity, natural gas and drinking water supply at all construction sites and bases
responsibilities.resp2: Analyze fuel and lubricant consumption and develop cost-saving measures
responsibilities.resp3: Maintain monitoring and reporting on electricity, gas, water and fuel consumption
responsibilities.resp4: Work with technical documentation and prepare reports for senior management

requirements.req1: At least 5 years of experience in energy or related field
requirements.req3: Strong knowledge of MS Word, Excel (advanced formulas), and PowerPoint
requirements.req4: Understanding of energy resource standardization and limit control procedures
requirements.req5: Responsibility, analytical thinking, and teamwork skills

job6.title: Power Engineer (Construction Sites and Production Bases)
job6.education: Higher or secondary specialized education in Electrical Engineering

responsibilities.resp1: Ensure uninterrupted operation of electrical systems at construction sites and production bases
responsibilities.resp2: Operate and manage electrical installations with a capacity of 1500 kW and above
responsibilities.resp3: Maintain transformer substations (TP), distribution boards, and cable networks in proper technical condition
responsibilities.resp4: Install, configure electrical equipment and promptly eliminate any malfunctions
responsibilities.resp5: Monitor compliance with safety regulations and fire safety rules

requirements.req1: Higher or secondary specialized education in electrical engineering
requirements.req2: Must possess Group V electrical safety certification
requirements.req3: Practical experience working with transformers, high-voltage switchboards, and automation systems
requirements.req4: Ability to read electrical diagrams and work with technical drawings
